comment.body:
How to Access the Volfefe Index
It’s important to note: The Volfefe Index is NOT a public, tradeable market index like the VIX (CBOE Volatility Index) or S&P 500.
	•	No Ticker Symbol: There is no official ticker for the Volfefe Index available on retail platforms such as TradingView, Thinkorswim (by TD Ameritrade), or Bloomberg terminals. It cannot be added as a symbol or watched/quoted like the VIX, SPX, or other standard market benchmarks.
	•	JPMorgan Proprietary: The index was developed for JPMorgan’s institutional clients and is primarily referenced in the firm’s research notes and market commentary, rather than as a live, public market data stream.
	•	Not Directly Visualized: Retail traders and most professionals cannot chart or screen the Volfefe Index in real time. Experts and media reference it when discussing the influence of political tweets on markets, but it’s not integrated into trading technology like public volatility indices.

	•	No Ticker Symbol: There is no official ticker for the Volfefe Index available on retail platforms such as TradingView, Thinkorswim (by TD Ameritrade), or Bloomberg terminals. It cannot be added as a symbol or watched/quoted like the VIX, SPX, or other standard market benchmarks.
	•	JPMorgan Proprietary: The index was developed for JPMorgan’s institutional clients and is primarily referenced in the firm’s research notes and market commentary, rather than as a live, public market data stream.
	•	Not Directly Visualized: Retail traders and most professionals cannot chart or screen the Volfefe Index in real time. Experts and media reference it when discussing the influence of political tweets on markets, but it’s not integrated into trading technology like public volatility indices.

comment.body: The Volfefe Index, created by JPMorgan in 2019, is a quantitative tool designed to measure the impact of presidential tweets—specifically those from President Donald Trump—on U.S. rates market volatility, with a particular focus on Treasury yields and broader bonds

comment.body:
Key Details of the Volfefe Index
	•	Purpose: The index quantifies how much volatility in the U.S. bond markets can be attributed to Trump’s tweets, especially those related to market-moving subjects like trade and monetary policy
